title: astragalus caprinus subsp. lanigerus
intro: Astragalus caprinus subsp. lanigerus, also known as the bearded milkvetch, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family, Fabaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, making it a popular ingredient in traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of Astragalus caprinus subsp. lanigerus are said to include improved immune function, reduced stress and fatigue, and enhanced overall well-being. Astragalus caprinus subsp. lanigerus can be prepared into various herbal products, such as teas, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to support health and vitality.
